one_time_description: Large earnings from investment in Band business entities (Chilcotin Plateau Enterprises Ltd.) of $1,714,941 compared to prior year loss of $499,676 - likely non-recurring swing
economic_notes: Band operates Toosey Enterprises (gas bar), Chilcotin Plateau Enterprises Ltd., Toosey Old School Holdings LP and related LPs (Training Centre, Construction, Wood Products), and portfolio investments in BC First Nations Gaming LP, Dene Development Corporation (33.3%), River West Forest Products Ltd. (22%). Forest license revenue from third-party harvesting also reported.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) no consolidated budget prepared as required under PSAS, and (2) insufficient audit evidence on carrying amounts of investments in Chilcotin Plateau Enterprises Ltd. and Toosey Old School Holdings LP (prepared on Notice to Reader basis). Prior year 2019 figures are restated. Deferred revenue of $767,365 from 2019 was fully recognized in 2020 as revenue. Investments in Band business entities swung from -$499,676 loss in 2019 to +$1,714,941 earnings in 2020. Audit report dated July 5, 2021 - significantly delayed. Toosey Enterprises revenue line appears to differ slightly between statement ($2,013,479 labeled) and revenue_lines sum; using $2,288,479 is incorrect - correcting: Toosey Enterprises = 2013479. OSR calculation excludes ISC, FNHA, CMHC, Province of BC, Tsilhqot'in National Government, CCATEC, FNESC, Denisiqi Services Society as government transfers totaling $2,871,897; however only clearly government transfers used for total_government_transfers field.
